creator: freebsd@bitter-almonds.com
text: The settings of device or ZFS dataset to be booted from & root to be mounted are so deeply burried somewhere that after setting "bootfs" property on a new different pool ("remake") & listing its child dataset ("remake/newroot/base") as the value of "vfs.root.mountfrom" in "/boot/loader.conf", FreeBSD still boots from "root" pool. :-(
